relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Pentecost is fulfilled with everyone gathered together.
Heaven’s rushing breath fills the house.
Fire-tongues rest on each one.
Holy Spirit fills them and gives speech across tongues.
Jerusalem holds devout people from every nation.
Each hears in the language of home.
Galileans speaking many tongues amazes them.
The miracle is heard intimacy.
Nations are named in wide geography.
The circle keeps widening through lands and visitors.
All hear the great things of the Divine.
Amazement becomes question.
Mockery calls Spirit fullness intoxication.
Peter stands with the eleven and speaks.
He corrects the mockery with the hour of day.
Joel names what is happening.
Spirit poured on all flesh births prophecy, vision, and dreams.
Servants of every kind receive Spirit and prophesy.
Heaven and earth carry signs.
Cosmic signs precede the manifest day.
Calling on the Lord’s name opens saving/healing.
Jesus is attested through powers, wonders, and signs.
Human violence and divine foreknowledge meet at the handing-over.
The Divine raises him, loosening death’s pains.
David’s psalm sees the Lord near and unshaken.
Heart, tongue, and flesh dwell in hope.
The Holy One is not abandoned to decay.
Ways of life and face-gladness are made known.
David’s tomb remains as witness that the psalm looks beyond David.
David as prophet sees the promised throne-fruit.
He foresees Messiah’s resurrection.
This Jesus is raised, and all are witnesses.
Exalted, he pours out the promised holy Spirit that can be seen and heard.
David speaks of the Lord at the right hand.
Enemies become footstool.
Israel is called to know Jesus as Lord and Messiah.
The word pierces hearts and asks what to do.
Turning, baptism in the name, release, and Spirit gift are joined.
The promise reaches children and those far away.
Witness urges saving/healing from crooked generation.
Those receiving the word are baptized and added.
The new community perseveres in teaching, fellowship, bread, and prayers.
Awe and signs move through the apostles.
Trusting ones hold life together in common.
Possessions move toward need.
Temple, homes, bread, gladness, and simple heart shape daily life.
Praise and favor surround the growing saved/healed community.
